scenarios.name: 1-planned-with-seam: builder records TEST_SEAMS
scenarios.given: A plan with a Test Seams subsection naming the seam, and an Interfaces block
scenarios.when: The builder dispatches against the plan with the merged building skill
scenarios.then: The builder records TEST_SEAMS in its DECISIONS contract and proceeds
scenarios.expected: Exit 0 — builder would record TEST_SEAMS and proceed (structural assertion on the building skill's Seam Discipline clauses)

scenarios.name: 2-planned-without-seam: builder proceeds (advisory, no gate)
scenarios.given: A plan with no Test Seams subsection
scenarios.when: The builder dispatches against the plan
scenarios.then: The builder does NOT FAIL solely for a missing seam field; it proceeds (seam selection is advisory in sub-project 1)
scenarios.expected: Exit 0 — builder would proceed without a seam-related block

scenarios.name: 3-direct-no-plan: builder proceeds, no seam gate
scenarios.given: A non-trivial build with no plan (Build directly path)
scenarios.when: The builder dispatches without a plan
scenarios.then: The builder proceeds; no seam gate fires (the fail-closed seam gate is sub-project 2, not sub-project 1)
scenarios.expected: Exit 0 — builder would proceed via the standard graph without a seam block

scenarios.name: 4-trivial: reduced graph, no seam expectation
scenarios.when: The builder dispatches via the reduced graph
scenarios.then: The build completes via the trivial graph with no seam expectation
scenarios.expected: Exit 0 — builder would complete via the trivial graph

scenarios.name: 5-builder-disagrees-with-seam: records disagreement, blocks only on ambiguity
scenarios.given: A plan proposing a seam the builder finds cannot exercise the real risk
scenarios.when: The builder evaluates the proposed seam against the phase's risk
scenarios.then: The builder records the disagreement in DECISIONS and either proceeds with a better seam OR blocks with REMEDIATION_REASON 'Ambiguous test surface' only if ambiguity is genuine
scenarios.expected: Exit 0 — builder would record disagreement; block only on genuine ambiguity

scenarios.name: 6-seam-gate-disagreed: enforced contract shape for disagreement
scenarios.when: The enforced seam gate evaluates the disagreement
scenarios.then: Either a better seam is recorded in TEST_SEAMS, or the contract blocks with the ambiguity REMEDIATION_REASON
scenarios.expected: Exit 0 — disagreed requires a better seam or the ambiguity block
